# SL-SCHEMA-006: breadcrumb-schema-incomplete

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

BreadcrumbList schema is incomplete.

## Metadata

- Category: Schema.org (schema-org)
- Default severity: warning
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- raw-html
- rendered-dom

## Required Evidence

- schema-fragment

## When This Triggers

Validate BreadcrumbList itemListElement entries for required position/name/item
data.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Complete BreadcrumbList entries.

- fixtures/schema/breadcrumb-incomplete

Fixed direction:

- Complete BreadcrumbList entries.
